title: T-005 — Migration: lab_results and supplier_specs tables
prompt: Create Drizzle migration for §5.5 lab_results and supplier_specs. `lab_results`(id PK, org_id, item_id FK items nullable, work_order_id UUID nullable, test_type TEXT CHECK in ('atp_swab','allergen_elisa','micro_apc','nutrition'), test_code, result_value NUMERIC(14,4), result_unit, result_status TEXT CHECK in ('pass','fail','inconclusive','pending'), threshold_rlu NUMERIC(10,2), tested_at, lab_provider, notes, created_by, created_at). `supplier_specs`(id PK, org_id, item_id FK items NOT NULL, supplier_code TEXT, spec_document_url, spec_version, issued_date, expiry_date, declared_allergens TEXT[], declared_attrs JSONB DEFAULT '{}', uploaded_at, uploaded_by). RLS org_id-scoped. Index idx_lab_results_item(org_id,item_id,tested_at DESC). RED command: `pnpm vitest run tests/db/lab-supplier.migration.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Lab results + supplier specs tables with RLS and result-status enum.
pipeline_inputs.details: ATP swab threshold default 10 RLU (V-TEC-44 trigger lives in T-026, not here). work_order_id FK lives in 08-PRODUCTION; here it is a soft UUID column. declared_allergens stored as TEXT[] (Postgres array) — supplier-declared codes resolved against allergens_reference at API layer.
acceptance_criteria: Given migration applied, when inserting lab_result with invalid test_type, then CHECK rejects.
Given supplier_specs row, when reading declared_allergens, then it returns TEXT[] array.
Given RLS active, when no org context, then both tables return 0 rows.
test_strategy: RED test for CHECK + RLS + array column.
risk_red_lines: Do not implement ATP auto-fail trigger here — it is its own task (T-026).
